meta.title: DoomSaver
meta.description: Plan and track your family finances together with DoomSaver

landing.title: Family budgeting that actually feels simple.
landing.subtitle: DoomSaver helps households plan income, build category templates, copy monthly budgets, and stay aligned with one shared view.
landing.motto: Clarity over chaos. Plan once, adapt monthly, and decide together.
landing.factsSubtitle: Everything below is based on features already available inside DoomSaver.

factsItems.copyBody: Copy into current or next month

usageItems.step1Body: Create a solo or couple workspace and invite members.
usageItems.step2Body: Define categories once, then reuse them each month.
usageItems.step3Body: Copy budget and income into current/next month and monitor from Dashboard.

benefitsItems.onePlanBody: Everyone sees the same goals, allocations, and ownership.
benefitsItems.monthlyRhythmBody: Use master templates and monthly copies instead of rebuilding from scratch.
benefitsItems.balancedDecisionsBody: Compare income vs allocation quickly and fix gaps early.

landing.featureShowcaseSubtitle: Track category allocation, member ownership, and month-by-month readiness in one flow.
landing.finalCtaBody: Create your account, set up your family space, and begin with your first master plan.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.subtitle: A practical toolkit for monthly family budgeting.

planningItems.one: Master templates for repeatable category structure.
planningItems.two: Monthly budget snapshots for current and next month.
planningItems.three: Copy workflows so you do not rebuild plans each month.

incomeItems.two: Copy income plans into current or next month.

dashboardItems.one: Budget selector drives dashboard cards and charts.
dashboardItems.two: Coverage and warning indicators for over-allocation.
dashboardItems.three: Category and member ownership visual breakdowns.

featuresPage.ctaTitle: Ready to plan with your household?
featuresPage.ctaBody: Create your account and set up your first family workspace.

aboutPage.title: About DoomSaver
aboutPage.subtitle: Built to make family money planning clear, shared, and repeatable.
aboutPage.missionBody: Help families replace financial confusion with a simple monthly planning rhythm they can actually maintain.

principles.oneBody: Keep plans visible and easy to understand for every member.
principles.twoBody: Use master templates and monthly copies to reduce setup effort.
principles.threeBody: Assign ownership and review progress together from one dashboard.

aboutPage.whoBody: Couples, families, and solo planners who want structured monthly budgeting without complex spreadsheets.
aboutPage.ctaBody: Sign up and create your planning workspace in minutes.

incomeChart.title: Income Breakdown
incomeChart.subtitle: Split across family members
incomeChart.emptySubtitle: Add income sources on the Income page

categoryChart.title: Budget by Category
categoryChart.subtitle: How income is allocated
categoryChart.emptySubtitle: Create categories and copy them into this budget from the Budgets page

memberExpenseChart.title: Expense by Member
memberExpenseChart.subtitle: Budget ownership split
memberExpenseChart.emptySubtitle: Assign subcategory budgets to family members

memberCategoryChart.title: Member Category Expense Split
memberCategoryChart.subtitle: Category-wise amount and percentage for each member
memberCategoryChart.emptySubtitle: Assign subcategory budgets to family members

budgetWarning.title: Budget exceeds income by {overBy}
budgetWarning.description: Your total category allocations ({totalAllocated}) are more than your total monthly income ({totalIncome}). Review your subcategory budgets to bring the total back within your income.

income.pageSubtitle: Manage master and monthly income plans for your family

manager.copySubtitle: Copy income entries from Master or any period into current or next month.
manager.label: Label

categories.pageSubtitle: Build the master category template used for monthly budgets

manager.emptySubtitle: Click Add Category below to get started.
manager.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete this category and all its subcategories?
manager.subEmpty: No subcategories yet — add one below.

budgets.pageSubtitle: Set allocations for master and monthly budget snapshots
budgets.copyTitle: Create or Refresh a Monthly Budget
budgets.copySubtitle: Copy from Master or any existing budget into the current or next month.
budgets.emptyTitle: No categories found in this budget.
budgets.emptySubtitle: Add categories to your Master template first, then copy again.

family.pageSubtitle: Manage your family settings and invite your partner

panel.inviteDescription: Share this code with your partner. They can enter it on the onboarding screen to join your family budget.
panel.inviteFootnote: The invite code is unique to your family. Only one partner can join.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your family budget
